content.content:
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      swift: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.swift }}
      rust: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.rust }}
      sample-app: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.sample-app }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            swift:
              - 'macOS/**'
              - 'Package.swift'
              - 'Package.resolved'
            rust:
              - 'windows/**'
              - 'Examples/windows/SampleApp/src-tauri/**'
            sample-app:
              - 'Examples/windows/SampleApp/**'
              - '!Examples/windows/SampleApp/src-tauri/**'

  swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.57.1
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.55.5
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config macOS/.swiftlint.yml macOS/Sources/ macOS/Tests/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config macOS/.swiftformat macOS/Sources/ macOS/Tests/

  swift-test:
    name: Swift Build & Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@cdf6c1fa76f9f475f3d7449005a359c84ca0f306 # v5
        with:
          path: |
            .build
            ~/Library/Caches/org.swift.swiftpm
          key: spm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: spm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Build
        run: swift build

      - name: Test
        run: swift test

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint (Linux)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2
        with:
          workspaces: "windows -> windows/target"

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: windows
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy (core — platform-agnostic)
        run: >
          cargo clippy --manifest-path windows/Cargo.toml
          -p audio-capture-core
          -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-clippy-windows:
    name: Rust Clippy (Windows)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
    runs-on: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2
        with:
          workspaces: "windows -> windows/target"

      - name: Clippy (windows crate)
        run: >
          cargo clippy --manifest-path windows/Cargo.toml
          -p audio-capture-windows
          -- -D warnings

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test (${{ matrix.package }})
    needs: changes
    # No job-level if: matrix jobs must always run so each expanded name
    # (e.g. "Rust Test (audio-capture-core)") is individually reported to
    # GitHub. A job-level if causes GitHub to report only the unexpanded
    # template name, which never satisfies the required status checks.
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - package: audio-capture-core
            os: ubuntu-latest
          - package: audio-capture-windows
            os: windows-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2
        if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
        with:
          workspaces: "windows -> windows/target"

      - name: Test
        if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
        run: cargo test --manifest-path windows/Cargo.toml -p ${{ matrix.package }}

  sample-app-lint:
    name: Sample App Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.sample-app == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: Examples/windows/SampleApp
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - uses: actions/setup-node@6044e13b5dc448c55e2357c09f80417699197238 # v6
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: Examples/windows/SampleApp/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: TypeScript type check
        run: npx tsc --noEmit

      - name: npm audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

content.content:
name: CodeQL

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * 3" # Wednesday 8AM UTC

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Swift changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Swift files changed
      swift: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.swift == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            swift:
              - 'macOS/**'
              - 'Package.swift'
              - 'Package.resolved'

  analyze-js:
    name: CodeQL (javascript-typescript)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          languages: javascript-typescript
          queries: security-extended

      - name: Autobuild
        uses: github/codeql-action/autobuild@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          category: /language:javascript-typescript

  analyze-swift:
    name: CodeQL (swift)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-15
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@cdf6c1fa76f9f475f3d7449005a359c84ca0f306 # v5
        with:
          path: |
            .build
            ~/Library/Caches/org.swift.swiftpm
          key: spm-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: spm-${{ runner.os }}-

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          languages: swift
          queries: security-extended

      - name: Build
        run: swift build

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          category: /language:swift

content.content:
name: Rust Security

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 7 * * 2" # Tuesday 7AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Rust changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Rust files changed
      rust: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.rust == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            rust:
              - 'windows/**'
              - 'Examples/windows/SampleApp/src-tauri/**'

  cargo-audit:
    name: cargo audit
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: rustsec/audit-check@69366f33c96575abad1ee0dba8212993eecbe998 # v2
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          working-directory: windows

  cargo-deny:
    name: cargo deny
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
      - uses: EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action@3fd3802e88374d3fe9159b834c7714ec57d6c979 # v2
        with:
          manifest-path: windows/Cargo.toml

content.content:
name: OpenSSF Scorecard

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 9 * * 4" # Thursday 9AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions: read-all

jobs:
  scorecard:
    name: Scorecard Analysis
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
      id-token: write # Needed for Scorecard's OIDC publishing
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Run Scorecard
        uses: ossf/scorecard-action@4eaacf0543bb3f2c246792bd56e8cdeffafb205a # v2.4.3
        with:
          results_file: results.sarif
          results_format: sarif
          publish_results: true

      - name: Upload SARIF
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          sarif_file: results.sarif

content.content:
name: Security Scan

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 6 * * 1" # Monday 6AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  trivy-dependency-scan:
    name: Trivy Dependency Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities)
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: table
          exit-code: 1

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities — SARIF)
        if: always()
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: sarif
          output: trivy-vuln.sarif

      - name: Upload Trivy SARIF (vulnerabilities)
        if: always()
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          sarif_file: trivy-vuln.sarif
          category: trivy-dependency-scan

  trivy-config-scan:
    name: Trivy Config & Secret Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6

      - name: Run Trivy (misconfig + secrets)
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: misconfig,secret
          format: table
          exit-code: 1

      - name: Run Trivy (misconfig + secrets — SARIF)
        if: always()
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: misconfig,secret
          format: sarif
          output: trivy-config.sarif

      - name: Upload Trivy SARIF (misconfig + secrets)
        if: always()
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          sarif_file: trivy-config.sarif
          category: trivy-config-scan

## AudioCaptureKit GitHub Actions Workflow Analysis

### Repository: `pablo-health/AudioCaptureKit`

There are 5 workflow files in `.github/workflows/`.

---

### Workflow File Contents

#### 1. `ci.yml` — Main CI (build, lint, test)

Triggers: push/PR to `main`, `workflow_dispatch`.

Jobs:
- `changes` — path filter to skip unnecessary jobs
- `swift-lint` — SwiftLint 0.57.1 + SwiftFormat 0.55.5 on `macos-15`
- `swift-test` — `swift build` + `swift test` on `macos-15`
- `rust-lint` — clippy + rustfmt on Linux (for `windows/` Rust crate)
- `rust-clippy-windows` — clippy on `windows-latest`
- `rust-test` — matrix over `audio-capture-core` (ubuntu) + `audio-capture-windows` (windows)
- `sample-app-lint` — TypeScript type check + `npm audit` for Tauri sample app
- `dependency-review` — PR-only dependency vulnerability check

#### 2. `codeql.yml` — CodeQL SAST

Triggers: push/PR to `main`, schedule Wednesdays 8AM UTC.

Jobs:
- `changes` — Swift path filter
- `analyze-js` — CodeQL for JavaScript/TypeScript
- `analyze-swift` — CodeQL for Swift on `macos-15`, with SPM cache

#### 3. `rust-security.yml` — Rust Supply Chain Security

Triggers: push/PR to `main`, schedule Tuesdays 7AM UTC, `workflow_dispatch`.

Jobs:
- `changes` — Rust path filter
- `cargo-audit` — `rustsec/audit-check` for known vulnerabilities
- `cargo-deny` — `EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action` for license + advisory policy

#### 4. `scorecard.yml` — OpenSSF Scorecard

Triggers: push to `main`, schedule Thursdays 9AM UTC, `workflow_dispatch`.

Jobs:
- `scorecard` — runs `ossf/scorecard-action`, publishes SARIF to GitHub Security tab

#### 5. `security.yml` — Trivy Scanning

Triggers: push/PR to `main`, schedule Mondays 6AM UTC, `workflow_dispatch`.

Jobs:
- `trivy-dependency-scan` — filesystem vuln scan (HIGH/CRITICAL), uploads SARIF
- `trivy-config-scan` — misconfig + secret scan, uploads SARIF

---

### Action Version Inventory and Status

| Action | Pinned SHA | Version Comment | Latest Release | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `actions/checkout` | `de0fac2e...` | `v6` | `v6.0.2` | **Current** — SHA matches v6.0.2 exactly |
| `actions/cache` | `cdf6c1fa...` | `v5` | `v5.0.3` | **Outdated** — SHA matches v5.0.3 but the `v5` floating tag now points to `v5.0.3`; the pinned SHA is correct but the comment should read `# v5.0.3` |
| `actions/setup-node` | `6044e13b...` | `v6` | `v6.2.0` | **Outdated** — SHA matches v6.0.0 (the SHA resolves to v6 but v6.2.0 is now available with newer node-version support) |
| `actions/dependency-review-action` | `05fe4576...` | `v4` | `v4.8.3` | **Current** — SHA matches v4.8.3 exactly |
| `github/codeql-action` (init/autobuild/analyze/upload-sarif) | `89a39a4e...` | `v4` | `v4.32.4` | **Current** — SHA resolves to v4.32.4 (confirmed by tag dereference) |
| `dorny/paths-filter` | `de90cc6f...` | `v3` | `v3.0.2` | **Current** — SHA matches v3.0.2 exactly |
| `Swatinem/rust-cache` | `779680da...` | `v2` | `v2.8.2` | **Current** — SHA matches v2.8.2 exactly |
| `dtolnay/rust-toolchain` | (no pin, uses `@stable`) | — | — | **Potentially concerning** — uses the `stable` channel alias with no SHA pin. Not pinned to a commit hash, meaning it pulls whatever `stable` means at run time. Acceptable for Rust toolchains but deviates from the security posture of everything else in these workflows. |
| `ossf/scorecard-action` | `4eaacf05...` | `v2.4.3` | `v2.4.3` | **Current** — SHA matches v2.4.3 exactly |
| `aquasecurity/trivy-action` | `e368e328...` | `0.34.1` | `0.34.1` | **Current** — SHA matches 0.34.1 exactly |
| `rustsec/audit-check` | `69366f33...` | `v2` | `v2.0.0` | **Current** — SHA matches v2.0.0 exactly (only one v2 release exists) |
| `EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action` | `3fd3802e...` | `v2` | `v2.0.15` | **Outdated** — pinned SHA matches v2.0.15, which is latest, so the SHA is correct. But comment just says `# v2` — should say `# v2.0.15`. The SHA is current. |

---

### Tool Versions Pinned in ci.yml (not via actions, downloaded directly)

| Tool | Version in AudioCaptureKit | Latest as of 2026-02 | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| SwiftLint | `0.57.1` | `0.63.2` | **Outdated by 6 minor versions** |
| SwiftFormat | `0.55.5` | `0.59.1` | **Outdated by 4 minor versions** |

These are hardcoded strings in the `swift-lint` job's `run:` steps — not action versions, but the tools themselves are significantly behind what pablo-companion's CI uses (`0.63.2` / `0.59.1`).

---

### Summary of Findings

**Genuine issues:**

1. **SwiftLint 0.57.1 is 6 versions behind** (latest: 0.63.2). pablo-companion's CI already uses 0.63.2. AudioCaptureKit's rules will differ — this matters because pablo-companion consumes AudioCaptureKit's Swift sources via SPM.

2. **SwiftFormat 0.55.5 is 4 versions behind** (latest: 0.59.1). Same concern.

3. **`dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable` is not SHA-pinned**. Every other action in these workflows uses `@<full-sha>` pinning for supply-chain security. `dtolnay/rust-toolchain` uses a channel alias (`stable`) with no SHA, which is inconsistent with the security posture of the rest of the CI. Low practical risk since dtolnay is a highly trusted maintainer, but it's a gap if you're aiming for full SLSA/Scorecard compliance.

4. **Comment accuracy**: `actions/cache` comment says `# v5` — should be `# v5.0.3` to match the pinned SHA. Same for `EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action` (`# v2` should be `# v2.0.15`) and `rustsec/audit-check` (`# v2` should be `# v2.0.0`). Minor hygiene issue.

**Everything else is current** — the SHA pins for `actions/checkout`, `actions/dependency-review-action`, `github/codeql-action`, `dorny/paths-filter`, `Swatinem/rust-cache`, `ossf/scorecard-action`, `aquasecurity/trivy-action`, and `rustsec/audit-check` all resolve to the latest published releases as of 2026-02-24.

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      mac: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.mac }}
      core: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.core }}
      has-cargo: ${{ steps.cargo-check.outputs.exists }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            mac:
              - 'mac/**'
            core:
              - 'core/**'
      - name: Check for core/Cargo.toml
        id: cargo-check
        run: |
          if [ -f core/Cargo.toml ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.63.2
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.59.1
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        id: spm-cache
        uses: actions/cache@6849a6489940f00c2f30c0fb92c6274307ccb58a # v4
        with:
          path: mac/SourcePackages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-spm-${{ hashFiles('mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-spm-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          DISABLE_PKGS=${{ steps.spm-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '-disableAutomaticPackageResolution' || '' }}
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages \
            $DISABLE_PKGS \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build | xcpretty

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Test
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo test

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

name: CodeQL

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 8 * * 3" # Wednesday 8AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Swift changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Swift files changed
      swift: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.swift == 'true' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            swift:
              - 'mac/**'

  analyze-swift:
    name: CodeQL (swift)
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.swift == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Initialize CodeQL
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          languages: swift
          queries: security-extended

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        id: spm-cache
        uses: actions/cache@6849a6489940f00c2f30c0fb92c6274307ccb58a # v4
        with:
          path: mac/SourcePackages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-spm-${{ hashFiles('mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-spm-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          DISABLE_PKGS=${{ steps.spm-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '-disableAutomaticPackageResolution' || '' }}
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages \
            $DISABLE_PKGS \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          category: /language:swift

name: OpenSSF Scorecard

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 9 * * 4" # Thursday 9AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions: read-all

jobs:
  scorecard:
    name: Scorecard Analysis
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      security-events: write
      id-token: write # Needed for Scorecard's OIDC publishing
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Run Scorecard
        uses: ossf/scorecard-action@4eaacf0543bb3f2c246792bd56e8cdeffafb205a # v2.4.3
        with:
          results_file: results.sarif
          results_format: sarif
          publish_results: true

      - name: Upload SARIF
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          sarif_file: results.sarif

name: Security Scan

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 6 * * 1" # Monday 6AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  trivy-dependency-scan:
    name: Trivy Dependency Scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities)
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: table
          exit-code: 1

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities — SARIF)
        if: always()
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: sarif
          output: trivy-vuln.sarif

name: Rust Security

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 7 * * 2" # Tuesday 7AM UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect Rust changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      # Always run on push/schedule; on PRs only run if Rust files changed
      rust: ${{ github.event_name != 'pull_request' || steps.filter.outputs.rust == 'true' }}
      has-cargo: ${{ steps.cargo-check.outputs.exists }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
        with:
          filters: |
            rust:
              - 'core/**'
      - name: Check for core/Cargo.toml
        id: cargo-check
        run: |
          if [ -f core/Cargo.toml ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  cargo-audit:
    name: cargo audit
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: rustsec/audit-check@69366f33c96575abad1ee0dba8212993eecbe998 # v2
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          working-directory: core

  cargo-deny:
    name: cargo deny
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.rust == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny-action@3fd3802e88374d3fe9159b834c7714ec57d6c979 # v2
        with:
          manifest-path: core/Cargo.toml

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.event_name == 'pull_request' }}

jobs:
  changes:
    name: Detect changes
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: read
    outputs:
      mac: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.mac }}
      core: ${{ github.event_name == 'push' || steps.filter.outputs.core }}
      has-cargo: ${{ steps.cargo-check.outputs.exists }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@de90cc6fb38fc0963ad72b210f1f284cd68cea36 # v3
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            mac:
              - 'mac/**'
            core:
              - 'core/**'
      - name: Check for core/Cargo.toml
        id: cargo-check
        run: |
          if [ -f core/Cargo.toml ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  swift-lint:
    name: Swift Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Install SwiftLint
        run: |
          SWIFTLINT_VERSION=0.63.2
          curl -sL "https://github.com/realm/SwiftLint/releases/download/${SWIFTLINT_VERSION}/portable_swiftlint.zip" -o swiftlint.zip
          unzip -q swiftlint.zip -d swiftlint
          echo "$PWD/swiftlint" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: Install SwiftFormat
        run: |
          SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION=0.59.1
          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        id: spm-cache
        uses: actions/cache@6849a6489940f00c2f30c0fb92c6274307ccb58a # v4
        with:
          path: mac/SourcePackages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-spm-${{ hashFiles('mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-spm-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          DISABLE_PKGS=${{ steps.spm-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '-disableAutomaticPackageResolution' || '' }}
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages \
            $DISABLE_PKGS \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build | xcpretty

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2

      - name: Test
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo test

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v4
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

          curl -sL "https://github.com/nicklockwood/SwiftFormat/releases/download/${SWIFTFORMAT_VERSION}/swiftformat.zip" -o swiftformat.zip
          unzip -q swiftformat.zip
          chmod +x swiftformat
          echo "$PWD" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"

      - name: SwiftLint
        run: swiftlint lint --strict --config mac/.swiftlint.yml mac/PabloCompanion/

      - name: SwiftFormat
        run: swiftformat --lint --config mac/.swiftformat mac/PabloCompanion/

  swift-build:
    name: Swift Build
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.mac == 'true' || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    runs-on: macos-26
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Cache SPM dependencies
        id: spm-cache
        uses: actions/cache@cdf6c1fa76f9f475f3d7449005a359c84ca0f306 # v5.0.3
        with:
          path: mac/SourcePackages
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-spm-${{ hashFiles('mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj/project.xcworkspace/xcshareddata/swiftpm/Package.resolved') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-spm-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          DISABLE_PKGS=${{ steps.spm-cache.outputs.cache-hit == 'true' && '-disableAutomaticPackageResolution' || '' }}
          xcodebuild -project mac/PabloCompanion.xcodeproj \
            -scheme PabloCompanion \
            -destination 'platform=macOS' \
            -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath mac/SourcePackages \
            $DISABLE_PKGS \
            CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="" \
            CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            build | xcpretty

  rust-lint:
    name: Rust Lint
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2

      - name: Check formatting
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo fmt --all --check

      - name: Clippy
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo clippy -- -D warnings -W clippy::undocumented_unsafe_blocks

  rust-test:
    name: Rust Test
    needs: changes
    if: needs.changes.outputs.core == 'true' && needs.changes.outputs.has-cargo == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@779680da715d629ac1d338a641029a2f4372abb5 # v2.8.2

      - name: Test
        working-directory: core
        run: cargo test

  dependency-review:
    name: Dependency Review
    if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/dependency-review-action@05fe4576374b728f0c523d6a13d64c25081e0803 # v4
        with:
          fail-on-severity: high
          deny-licenses: GPL-2.0, GPL-3.0, AGPL-3.0

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities)
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: table
          exit-code: 1

      - name: Run Trivy (vulnerabilities — SARIF)
        if: always()
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: vuln
          severity: HIGH,CRITICAL
          format: sarif
          output: trivy-vuln.sarif

      - name: Upload Trivy SARIF (vulnerabilities)
        if: always()
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@89a39a4e59826350b863aa6b6252a07ad50cf83e # v4
        with:
          sarif_file: trivy-vuln.sarif
          category: trivy-dependency-scan

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2

        with:
          scan-type: fs
          scan-ref: .
          scanners: misconfig,secret
          format: table

        if: always()
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@e368e328979b113139d6f9068e03accaed98a518 # 0.34.1
        with:

          scan-ref: .
          scanners: misconfig,secret
